eligibility_check.title: Eligibility Check
eligibility_check.description: Enter your basic details to see if you are eligible to participate in the democratic process.

validation.message: Minimum age for voting in India is 18 years.
Only Indian citizens are eligible to vote.

voter_registration.title: Registration Status
voter_registration.description: Check if your name is already in the electoral roll.

polling_booth_lookup.title: Find Your Booth
polling_booth_lookup.description: Locate your assigned polling station based on your constituency.

validation.message: Constituency is required to find your booth.

identity_verification.title: Identity Verification
identity_verification.description: Provide your EPIC (Voter ID) number for verification at the booth.

vote_casting.title: Cast Your Vote
vote_casting.description: Select your candidate on the Electronic Voting Machine.

validation.message: Please select a candidate to proceed.

confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: Your vote has been recorded securely. Verify your VVPAT slip.
